title: Gemini网页新增Canva连接应用
full_text:
Not sure when, but I finally got a new Connected App on the Gemini web.
@canva is now available 🔥
There were loads of connectors in development for quite a while, plus mobile apps have much more than the web version.
Which ones do you have? 👀 https://t.co/kdTYduXOja
